name: record
description: Local adapter skills for installed capture and transcribe CLIs.

interface.shortDescription: Capture apps and transcribe local media.
interface.longDescription: Record exposes two local adapter skills for the installed capture and transcribe CLIs. It helps agents start and stop OBS-backed Mac app recordings and transcribe local media with whisper.cpp while keeping recordings, transcripts, metadata, and setup state on the user's machine.
defaultPrompt: Use $capture to record a visible Mac app.
Use $transcribe to transcribe a local media file.
